artificial_sun.mekanismsun.port_mode: Toggled Artificial Sun Port mode to: %1$s.
description.mekanismsun.artificial_sun_c: Using a high-strength shell treated with antimatter, it contains immense energy and can withstand the high temperatures of the sun.
description.mekanismsun.artificial_sun_p: A port used for the transfer of energy and substances in the Artificial Sun.
description.mekanismsun.freezer: Use extremely low-temperature to freeze gas.
